name: Bonnie Canned Cat Food - Chicken in Gravy 400g
shortDescription: Nutritious wet food made with tender chicken pieces in sauce. Enriched with essential vitamins, minerals, and taurine to support strong muscles, healthy digestion, and hydration for adult cats.
description: Bonnie Chicken Adult Cat Canned Food offers a delicious and balanced meal for adult cats. Made with tender meat pieces in a tasty sauce, it provides essential nutrients to support overall health and vitality. The recipe contains quality chicken protein, vitamins, and minerals to help maintain strong muscles, a shiny coat, and optimal well-being. Its high moisture content also supports hydration and kidney health. Key Benefits: Made with high-quality chicken protein (4%) for strength and energy. Rich in moisture (82%) to support hydration and urinary health. Contains essential vitamins and minerals for a healthy coat and immune system. Fortified with taurine to support heart and vision health. Soft texture and savory sauce make it highly palatable for adult cats. Ingredients: Meat and Animal Derivatives (4% Chicken), Grains, Minerals, Plant By-products, Sugar. Nutritional Values: Component Value Crude Protein 6.5% Crude Fats and Oils 3.5% Crude Fibre 0.3% Raw Ash 2% Moisture 82% Nutritional Additives (per kg): Vitamin D3: 150 IU Vitamin E: 10 IU Copper: 1.4 mg Manganese: 2 mg Zinc: 10 mg Taurine: 220 mg Feeding Recommendations and Warnings Refer to the feeding table for guidance. Individual requirements may vary depending on your cat’s age, breed, and activity level . Ensure fresh drinking water is available at all times. Serve the food at room temperature for optimal taste and digestibility.
